methodology.audienceCaveat: 多数平台不会公开跨平台去重后的观看人数。第一条 PK 条使用去重代理：短视频侧锚定全球月度社交媒体用户身份，长视频侧锚定全球互联网用户乘以月度流媒体/在线视频覆盖率。它比平台月活直接相加更接近真实人群，但仍不是平台级跨设备身份图谱。
methodology.durationCaveat: 主要短视频平台没有公开按秒数分组的全球观看人数。页面里的 TikTok 秒数层级来自公开视频长度研究、平台时长限制和月度覆盖数据的模型估算，适合看方向，不适合当作精确审计值。
methodology.creatorCaveat: 创作者数量和上传量披露很不均匀。能找到官方披露的地方使用官方值；没有披露的地方会标注为模型值或第三方估算。

kpis.label: 短视频/社交视频入口
kpis.note: Raw, non-deduplicated sum across TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram/Reels, Facebook/Reels, Snapchat, Threads, and X.

kpis.label: 长视频/流媒体入口
kpis.unit: 百万月活/订阅/观看入口
kpis.note: Raw, non-deduplicated sum across YouTube long-form, Bilibili, Tencent Video, iQIYI, Youku, Netflix, Prime Video, Disney+/Hulu, and HBO Max.

kpis.label: YouTube Shorts
kpis.note: YouTube CEO Neal Mohan announced Shorts averaged over 200B daily views in 2025.

kpis.label: Bilibili
kpis.note: Bilibili Q4 2025 average daily time spent per active user.

platforms.name: Instagram / Reels
platforms.audienceMetric: Instagram MAU; Reels is a major growth driver

platforms.name: YouTube long-form
platforms.audienceMetric: MAU estimate; platform also includes Shorts

creatorSupply.creatorMetric: modeled creator accounts posting short video
third-party estimate of active monthly channels
modeled studios, channels, and professional content suppliers

pkBars.label: 全球观看人群估算（去重代理）
pkBars.unit: 百万，基于 DataReportal/GWI 覆盖率

pkBars.label: 中国视频 App 月活入口
每日新增视频量（报告+估算）

aiVideo.methodNote: 目前没有任何平台或研究机构公开 TikTok、YouTube、Instagram、Facebook、X、Sora、Kling、Runway、Pika 以及企业工具中的 AI 视频全球全量普查。下面图表把公开披露、可观察样本研究和明确标注的代理估算放在一起展示。
aiVideo.methodNoteEn: No platform or research group currently publishes a complete global census of AI-generated videos across TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, X, Sora, Kling, Runway, Pika, and enterprise tools. The charts below combine public platform disclosures, observable research samples, and clearly marked proxy estimates.

volumeMetrics.label: 纯 AI 短视频存量
volumeMetrics.note: 来自 Kling AI、Pictory、Vivideo 等已披露生成量的合计口径，未包含大量封闭或未标注的生成工具。

volumeMetrics.label: 纯 AI 短视频日增
volumeMetrics.note: 根据公开累计生成量推算的日增代理，主要锚定 Kling AI 自上线以来生成 1.68 亿条视频这一披露。

volumeMetrics.label: AI/真人融合长视频存量代理
volumeMetrics.note: Kapwing 的 YouTube 研究发现 AI-only / AI slop 频道累计获得 630 亿次观看。这里把它作为可见度代理，不是 AI 辅助长视频的完整条数。

volumeMetrics.label: AI/真人融合长视频日增代理
volumeMetrics.note: 基于 YouTube 每日 2000 万条上传量，以及 Kapwing 在全球前 15000 个频道中识别出 278 个 AI-only 频道的比例做方向性推算。

ratios.label: 短视频 feed：AI vs 真人/未标注
ratios.note: Kapwing 新账号测试中，前 500 条 YouTube 推荐里有 104 条被判定为 AI slop。这是曝光代理，不是全平台上传占比。

ratios.label: 长视频制作：AI 辅助 vs 纯真人流程
ratios.note: Sprout Social 报告称 63% 的营销人员使用 AI 工具来编辑、扩展或加速视频产出。这里作为长视频生产流程的 AI 参与代理。

ratios.label: 创意人群：使用 AI vs 未使用 AI
ratios.note: Hedra 引用 Artlist 对 6500 多名创作者的调查：87% 的创意专业人士在工作流中使用 AI 工具，66% 每周使用。

sources.name: DataReportal Digital 2026 global social media notes
sources.summary: Kepios/DataReportal estimates 5.66B global social media user identities and explains platform reach caveats.

sources.name: DataReportal Digital 2025 Global Overview
sources.summary: DataReportal says YouTube was the most-used social platform at the start of 2025 and discusses TikTok time spent.

sources.name: Public TikTok user-count range, 2026

sources.summary: Coverage of YouTube CEO Neal Mohan's 2025 announcement that Shorts averaged 200B daily views.

sources.name: Google: 2B logged-in monthly Shorts viewers
sources.summary: Google said more than 2B logged-in monthly users were watching YouTube Shorts.

sources.name: Instagram reaches 3B MAU
sources.summary: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg announced Instagram reached 3B monthly active users in September 2025.

sources.name: Meta Reels daily shares
sources.summary: Reports Meta data that users shared 3.5B Reels daily across Facebook and Instagram.

sources.name: Threads 400M MAU and X comparison
sources.summary: Threads passed 400M MAU; article cites prior X statements of 600M+ MAU.

sources.name: Snap Q4 2025 financial results
sources.summary: Snap reported Snapchat reached 946M global monthly active users in Q4 2025.

sources.name: QuestMobile China short-video MAU, Sep 2025
sources.summary: QuestMobile reported China's short-video app industry at 1.129B MAU, with Douyin main app at 936M and Kuaishou main app at 458M.

sources.name: QuestMobile China long-video MAU, Sep 2025
sources.summary: QuestMobile reported China's online-video app industry at 799M MAU, including Tencent Video 350M, iQIYI 325M, Bilibili 228M, and Youku 174M.

sources.name: Bilibili Q4/FY 2025 financial results
sources.summary: Bilibili reported 113M DAU, 366M MAU, and 107 minutes average daily time spent per active user in Q4 2025.

sources.name: Bilibili 2025 ESG report creator data
sources.summary: Bilibili reported approximately 4M monthly active content creators and 24M monthly video submissions in 2025.

sources.name: iQIYI Q4/FY 2025 financial results
sources.summary: iQIYI reported FY2025 revenue, membership services revenue, and content costs; it no longer consistently discloses MAU in earnings releases.

sources.name: Netflix Q4 2025 subscriber milestone
sources.summary: Netflix reportedly crossed 325M paid subscribers in Q4 2025 after moving away from quarterly subscriber reporting.

sources.name: Netflix ads monthly active viewers
sources.summary: Netflix said its ad-supported tier reached 190M monthly active viewers globally under its MAV metric.

sources.name: Prime Video 315M ad-supported monthly viewers
sources.summary: Amazon said Prime Video reached more than 315M average monthly ad-supported viewers globally.

sources.name: Disney+ and Hulu combined subscribers
sources.summary: Disney said Disney+ and Hulu combined had 183M subscribers, with Disney+ at 128M, before ending regular subscriber disclosures.

sources.name: HBO Max / Max subscribers
sources.summary: Axios reported Max had 122M global subscribers and targeted 150M by end-2026.

sources.name: YouTube 20th anniversary upload stats
sources.summary: YouTube said more than 20B videos had been uploaded and that over 20M videos were uploaded daily around its 20th anniversary.

sources.name: YouTube Partner Program explained
sources.summary: YouTube explains YPP eligibility and revenue sharing for long-form and Shorts.

sources.name: YouTube creator statistics
sources.summary: Third-party creator statistics estimate 115M YouTube channels and 60-65M active channels.

sources.name: DataReportal Digital 2026 Mid-Year Update
sources.summary: DataReportal reports 6.12B internet users and 5.79B global social-media user identities in April 2026, with caveats that identities may not equal unique people.

sources.name: DataReportal Digital 2026 Global Overview
sources.summary: GWI data in DataReportal says 94.6% of online adults watched online video monthly and 91.7% consumed streaming TV content monthly.

sources.name: ClickAnalytic TikTok Creator Statistics 2026
sources.summary: ClickAnalytic reported 15.8M TikTok creators analyzed in its Creator Economy Report 2026.

sources.name: StatsPanda TikTok upload estimate
sources.summary: StatsPanda estimates 34M TikTok videos uploaded per day.

sources.name: Kling AI generated-video milestone
sources.summary: Coverage of Poe/Kling AI data says Kling AI exceeded 22M global users and had generated over 168M videos.

sources.name: Pictory 2025 AI video generation
sources.summary: Pictory reported 5.8M AI-powered videos generated in 2025 and 183,000 hours of AI-powered video content.

sources.name: Vivideo State of AI Video Creation 2026
sources.summary: Vivideo reports 120,000+ AI videos created by 205,000+ users across 220 countries, with vertical video at 43.7% of orders.

sources.name: Agent Opus AI Video Statistics 2026
sources.summary: Agent Opus analyzed 36,388 AI videos; median length was 43 seconds and p90 was 103 seconds.

sources.name: Guardian coverage of Kapwing AI-slop study
sources.summary: Kapwing analyzed top YouTube channels and a new-user recommendation feed, finding more than 20% of recommended videos were AI slop and 278 of 15,000 top channels were AI-only.

sources.name: Anadolu Agency report on Kapwing AI-slop study
sources.summary: Reports Kapwing's finding that 104 of the first 500 recommended videos on a new YouTube account were AI slop, and AI-only channels had 63B views and 221M subscribers.

sources.name: Sprout Social video statistics 2026
sources.summary: Sprout Social says 91% of businesses use video and 63% of marketers use AI tools to edit, scale, and accelerate video output.

sources.name: Hedra AI video trends 2026
sources.summary: Hedra cites an Artlist survey of 6,500+ creators across 140 countries: 87% use AI tools in workflows and 66% use them weekly.

sources.name: OpenAI Sora app reaches 1M downloads
sources.summary: TechCrunch reports Sora reached 1M downloads in under five days after launch, according to OpenAI's Sora lead.

sources.name: Meta Vibes AI feed usage
sources.summary: Business Insider-syndicated coverage says Meta's Vibes AI video feed had about 2M daily active users on November 9, 2025.
